customProfiles.label: architecture hygiene (整洁锐评)
customProfiles.framing: cc-market 整洁锐评: per-plugin architecture hygiene, progressive disclosure, and file bloat. NOT a diff review — explore the repo as it stands.
reviewScope: Plugin layering: each plugin's boundary is clear, and its docs do NOT describe a lower layer's internals (rem = base; sharp-review above it; evolve on top). Flag leaked implementation detail across layers
Cross-file duplication: the same fact restated in both SKILL.md and AGENTS.md (or any two docs) — these drift; one must be the source and the other link to it

Progressive disclosure: runtime files (SKILL.md) carry only the execution path + clear I/O + links to reference/. Mechanism, schemas, weight math, and edge cases must live in reference/*.md (loaded on demand), not the always-loaded skill
File bloat: flag any single file over 100 lines — especially SKILL.md and other runtime docs — with a concrete split/extract suggestion
Profile/prompt economy: review templates and framings must be tight; flag verbose or low-signal instruction text
